parameters.name: body
parameters.value: ={{ JSON.stringify({ model: $env.CLAUDE_MODEL || 'claude-sonnet-4-20250514', max_tokens: 2048, messages: [{ role: 'user', content: `Write a brief narrative summary (3-5 paragraphs) of this weekly dev activity. Make it engaging and readable for a team channel. Language: ${$env.LANGUAGE || 'EN'}\n\n${$json.summary}` }] }) }}
